---
params:
  league: "東京六大学"
format:
  html:
    page-layout: full
---

```{r setup}
library(tidyverse)
library(reactable)
library(plotly)
library(htmltools)
library(lubridate)

LEAGUE <- params$league

final_ratings <- read_csv("../../data_out/ratings/final_ratings.csv",
  show_col_types = FALSE
) |>
  mutate(date = as.Date(date))

rating_hist <- read_csv("../../data_out/ratings/rating_history.csv",
  show_col_types = FALSE
) |>
  mutate(date = as.Date(date))

game_results <- read_csv("../../data_out/ratings/game_results_with_ratings.csv",
  show_col_types = FALSE
) |>
  mutate(gamedate = as.Date(gamedate))

teams_info <- readxl::read_excel("../../data_out/teamdata.xlsx") |>
  mutate(
    c1 = paste0("#", ColorCode1),
    c2 = paste0("#", if_else(is.na(ColorCode2), ColorCode1, ColorCode2)),
    c3 = paste0(
      "#",
      if_else(
        is.na(ColorCode3),
        if_else(is.na(ColorCode2), ColorCode1, ColorCode2),
        ColorCode3
      )
    )
  )

TEAM_SLUG <- c(
  "東大" = "todai",
  "明治" = "meiji",
  "慶應" = "keio",
  "早稲田" = "waseda",
  "立教" = "rikkyo",
  "法政" = "hosei"
)

LEAGUE_SLUG <- c("東京六大学" = "tokyo6")

team_url <- function(team, prefix = "../") {
  slug <- TEAM_SLUG[[team]]
  if (is.null(slug) || is.na(slug)) {
    return("#")
  }
  paste0(prefix, "university/", slug, ".html")
}

league_team_info <- teams_info |> filter(LeagueName == LEAGUE)
league_teams <- league_team_info$TeamShortName

league_ratings <- final_ratings |>
  arrange(rank) |>
  filter(team %in% league_teams) |>
  left_join(
    teams_info |> select(TeamShortName, TeamName, c1),
    by = c("team" = "TeamShortName")
  )

league_avg_display <- round(mean(league_ratings$display_rating), 1)

league_rank_tbl <- final_ratings |>
  left_join(
    teams_info |> select(TeamShortName, LeagueName),
    by = c("team" = "TeamShortName")
  ) |>
  filter(!is.na(LeagueName)) |>
  group_by(LeagueName) |>
  summarise(avg = mean(display_rating), .groups = "drop") |>
  arrange(desc(avg)) |>
  mutate(league_rank = row_number())

league_rank_pos <- league_rank_tbl |>
  filter(LeagueName == LEAGUE) |>
  pull(league_rank)

if (length(league_rank_pos) == 0) {
  league_rank_pos <- NA_integer_
}

total_leagues <- nrow(league_rank_tbl)

global_mean <- mean(rating_hist$rating)
global_sd <- sd(rating_hist$rating)
to_disp <- function(r) round(50 + 10 * (r - global_mean) / global_sd, 1)

available_yrs <- sort(unique(year(
  game_results$gamedate[
    (game_results$team1 %in% league_teams | game_results$team2 %in% league_teams) &
      game_results$gamedate <= Sys.Date()
  ]
)), decreasing = TRUE)
default_yr <- if (length(available_yrs) > 0) as.character(available_yrs[[1]]) else as.character(max(year(game_results$gamedate)))

league_hist <- rating_hist |>
  filter(team %in% league_teams) |>
  left_join(
    league_team_info |> select(TeamShortName, TeamName, c1),
    by = c("team" = "TeamShortName")
  ) |>
  arrange(team, date)

league_games <- game_results |>
  filter(team1 %in% league_teams | team2 %in% league_teams) |>
  mutate(
    yr = as.character(year(gamedate)),
    is_a = r1_before >= r2_before,
    team_a = if_else(is_a, team1, team2),
    team_b = if_else(is_a, team2, team1),
    score_a = if_else(is_a, score1, score2),
    score_b = if_else(is_a, score2, score1),
    rate_a = if_else(is_a, r1_before, r2_before),
    rate_b = if_else(is_a, r2_before, r1_before),
    delta_a = if_else(is_a, delta, -delta),
    score_dash = ""
  ) |>
  left_join(
    teams_info |> select(TeamShortName, TeamName, c1),
    by = c("team_a" = "TeamShortName")
  ) |>
  rename(name_a = TeamName, c1_a = c1) |>
  left_join(
    teams_info |> select(TeamShortName, TeamName, c1),
    by = c("team_b" = "TeamShortName")
  ) |>
  rename(name_b = TeamName, c1_b = c1) |>
  mutate(
    disp_a = to_disp(rate_a),
    disp_b = to_disp(rate_b),
    delta_a_disp = round(10 * delta_a / global_sd, 1)
  ) |>
  arrange(desc(gamedate)) |>
  select(
    yr, gamedate, gametype,
    team_a, name_a, c1_a, disp_a, score_a,
    score_dash, score_b, team_b, name_b, c1_b, disp_b,
    delta_a_disp
  )

search_targets <- bind_rows(
  teams_info |>
    transmute(
      label = TeamName,
      search = paste(TeamName, TeamShortName, LeagueName),
      url = paste0("university/", TEAM_SLUG[TeamShortName], ".html")
    ),
  teams_info |>
    distinct(LeagueName) |>
    transmute(
      label = LeagueName,
      search = LeagueName,
      url = paste0("league/", LEAGUE_SLUG[LeagueName], ".html")
    )
) |>
  filter(!is.na(url))

search_targets_json <- jsonlite::toJSON(search_targets, dataframe = "rows", auto_unbox = TRUE)

matchup_cell <- function(label, team, color, rating) {
  tags$div(
    class = "matchup-cell",
    tags$div(class = "team-color-bar", style = paste0("background:", color)),
    tags$div(
      class = "matchup-text",
      tags$a(
        href = team_url(team),
        class = "team-link-inline",
        style = paste0("color:", color),
        label
      ),
      tags$span(class = "rating-badge", paste0("試合前 ", sprintf("%.1f", rating)))
    )
  )
}

score_cell <- function(score, opp_score) {
  cls <- if (!is.na(score) && !is.na(opp_score) && score > opp_score) {
    "score-cell score-winner"
  } else {
    "score-cell"
  }
  tags$span(class = cls, ifelse(is.na(score), "-", score))
}
```

```{r league-header}
search_options <- tags$datalist(
  id = "site-search-options",
  lapply(search_targets$label, function(lbl) tags$option(value = lbl))
)

hero_script <- glue::glue(
  "
  (function() {{
    const targets = {search_targets_json};
    const defaultYear = '{default_yr}';
    const plotSelector = '#league-rating-chart .plotly, #league-rating-chart .js-plotly-plot';

    function normalize(value) {{
      return String(value || '').replace(/\\s+/g, '').toLowerCase();
    }}

    function syncYear(value) {{
      if (!value) return;
      window.localStorage.setItem('cbr-selected-year', value);
      document.querySelectorAll('[data-global-year]').forEach(function(select) {{
        if ([].some.call(select.options, function(opt) {{ return opt.value === value; }})) {{
          select.value = value;
        }}
      }});
    }}

    function applyYear(year) {{
      syncYear(year);

      function updateTable() {{
        if (window.Reactable) {{
          Reactable.setFilter('league-games-table', 'yr', year);
        }} else {{
          setTimeout(updateTable, 100);
        }}
      }}

      function updatePlot() {{
        if (!window.Plotly) {{
          setTimeout(updatePlot, 200);
          return;
        }}
        const plot = document.querySelector(plotSelector);
        if (!plot) {{
          setTimeout(updatePlot, 200);
          return;
        }}
        Plotly.relayout(plot, {{
          'xaxis.range': [year + '-01-01', year + '-12-31']
        }});
      }}

      updateTable();
      updatePlot();
    }}

    function goSearch() {{
      const input = document.querySelector('[data-search-input]');
      if (!input) return;
      const key = normalize(input.value);
      if (!key) return;
      const match = targets.find(function(target) {{
        return normalize(target.label) === key || normalize(target.search).indexOf(key) !== -1;
      }});
      if (match) {{
        syncYear(document.querySelector('[data-global-year]')?.value || defaultYear);
        window.location.href = '../' + match.url;
      }}
    }}

    document.addEventListener('DOMContentLoaded', function() {{
      const year = window.localStorage.getItem('cbr-selected-year') || defaultYear;
      syncYear(year);
      applyYear(year);

      document.querySelectorAll('[data-global-year]').forEach(function(select) {{
        select.addEventListener('change', function(event) {{
          applyYear(event.target.value);
        }});
      }});

      document.querySelectorAll('[data-search-go]').forEach(function(button) {{
        button.addEventListener('click', function() {{
          goSearch();
        }});
      }});

      document.querySelectorAll('[data-search-input]').forEach(function(input) {{
        input.addEventListener('keydown', function(event) {{
          if (event.key === 'Enter') {{
            event.preventDefault();
            goSearch();
          }}
        }});
      }});
    }});
  }})();
  "
)

rank_text <- if (!is.na(league_rank_pos)) {
  paste0("リーグ順位 ", league_rank_pos, " 位 / ", total_leagues, " リーグ")
} else {
  "集計中"
}

top_team_name <- if (nrow(league_ratings) > 0) league_ratings$TeamName[[1]] else "-"
top_team_rating <- if (nrow(league_ratings) > 0) sprintf("%.1f", league_ratings$display_rating[[1]]) else "-"

tagList(
  div(
    class = "detail-panel",
    div(
      class = "detail-toolbar",
      div(
        class = "control-block",
        div(class = "control-label", "大学・リーグ検索"),
        div(
          class = "search-shell",
          tags$input(
            class = "search-input",
            type = "search",
            placeholder = "大学名またはリーグ名を入力",
            list = "site-search-options",
            `data-search-input` = "site"
          ),
          tags$button(class = "control-button", type = "button", `data-search-go` = "site", "移動")
        )
      ),
      div(
        class = "control-block",
        div(class = "control-label", "表示年度"),
        tags$select(
          class = "year-select",
          `data-global-year` = "site",
          lapply(available_yrs, function(yr) tags$option(value = yr, as.character(yr)))
        )
      )
    ),
    div(
      class = "detail-header",
      div(
        div(class = "detail-eyebrow", "League"),
        h1(class = "detail-title", LEAGUE),
        p(
          class = "detail-subtitle",
          paste0(length(league_teams), " 校の所属チームを平均レートで比較しています。")
        )
      ),
      div(
        class = "detail-value-panel",
        div(class = "detail-eyebrow", rank_text),
        div(class = "detail-value", sprintf("%.1f", league_avg_display)),
        div(class = "detail-subtitle", "所属チーム平均レート")
      )
    ),
    div(
      class = "summary-strip",
      div(
        class = "summary-item",
        div(class = "summary-label", "所属チーム数"),
        div(class = "summary-value", length(league_teams))
      ),
      div(
        class = "summary-item",
        div(class = "summary-label", "リーグ首位"),
        div(class = "summary-value", top_team_name)
      ),
      div(
        class = "summary-item",
        div(class = "summary-label", "首位チームレート"),
        div(class = "summary-value", top_team_rating)
      ),
      div(
        class = "summary-item",
        div(class = "summary-label", "対象年度"),
        div(class = "summary-value", paste0(min(available_yrs), "-", max(available_yrs)))
      )
    ),
    search_options,
    tags$script(HTML(hero_script))
  )
)
```

## レーティング推移

```{r league-chart}
if (nrow(league_hist) > 0) {
  plot_widget <- plot_ly()

  for (tm in league_teams) {
    tm_data <- league_hist |> filter(team == tm)
    if (nrow(tm_data) == 0) {
      next
    }

    tm_name <- tm_data$TeamName[[1]]
    tm_color <- tm_data$c1[[1]]

    plot_widget <- add_trace(
      plot_widget,
      data = tm_data,
      x = ~date,
      y = ~display_rating,
      name = tm_name,
      type = "scatter",
      mode = "lines+markers",
      line = list(color = tm_color, width = 2.8),
      marker = list(color = tm_color, size = 5),
      text = ~paste0(
        tm_name, "<br>",
        format(date, "%Y/%m/%d"), "<br>",
        "レート: ", round(display_rating, 1)
      ),
      hoverinfo = "text"
    )
  }

  div(
    class = "chart-shell",
    div(
      id = "league-rating-chart",
      plot_widget |>
        layout(
          xaxis = list(title = "", gridcolor = "#D6DFD8", zeroline = FALSE, tickformat = "%Y/%m"),
          yaxis = list(title = "レート", gridcolor = "#D6DFD8", zeroline = FALSE),
          legend = list(orientation = "h", y = -0.18),
          margin = list(l = 60, r = 20, t = 20, b = 70),
          paper_bgcolor = "white",
          plot_bgcolor = "white",
          font = list(family = "Segoe UI Variable Display, Segoe UI, sans-serif")
        )
    )
  )
} else {
  div(class = "copy-shell", tags$p("表示できる推移データがありません。"))
}
```

## リーグ内チームランキング

```{r league-team-ranking}
div(
  class = "table-shell",
  reactable(
    league_ratings,
    pagination = FALSE,
    highlight = TRUE,
    columns = list(
      rank = colDef(
        name = "全国",
        width = 60,
        align = "center",
        cell = function(v) tags$span(class = "rank-number", v)
      ),
      TeamName = colDef(
        name = "大学",
        minWidth = 190,
        cell = function(v, ri) {
          row <- league_ratings[ri, ]
          tags$div(
            class = "team-name-cell",
            tags$div(class = "team-color-bar", style = paste0("background:", row$c1)),
            tags$a(
              href = team_url(row$team),
              class = "team-name-link",
              style = paste0("color:", row$c1),
              v
            )
          )
        }
      ),
      display_rating = colDef(
        name = "レート",
        width = 96,
        align = "right",
        cell = function(v) tags$span(class = "rating-number", sprintf("%.1f", v))
      ),
      team = colDef(show = FALSE),
      date = colDef(show = FALSE),
      rating = colDef(show = FALSE),
      c1 = colDef(show = FALSE)
    )
  )
)
```

## 試合一覧

```{r league-games}
div(
  class = "table-shell",
  reactable(
    league_games,
    filterable = TRUE,
    defaultPageSize = 15,
    showPageSizeOptions = TRUE,
    pageSizeOptions = c(15, 50, 200),
    highlight = TRUE,
    elementId = "league-games-table",
    columns = list(
      yr = colDef(show = FALSE, filterable = TRUE),
      gamedate = colDef(
        name = "日時",
        width = 112,
        align = "right",
        format = colFormat(date = TRUE, locales = "ja-JP"),
        filterable = FALSE
      ),
      gametype = colDef(name = "試合種別", minWidth = 120, filterable = FALSE),
      name_a = colDef(
        name = "大学A",
        minWidth = 190,
        filterable = FALSE,
        cell = function(v, ri) {
          row <- league_games[ri, ]
          matchup_cell(row$name_a, row$team_a, row$c1_a, row$disp_a)
        }
      ),
      score_a = colDef(
        name = "A",
        width = 62,
        align = "center",
        filterable = FALSE,
        cell = function(v, ri) score_cell(v, league_games$score_b[[ri]])
      ),
      score_dash = colDef(
        name = "",
        width = 36,
        align = "center",
        filterable = FALSE,
        cell = function() tags$span(class = "dash-cell", "-")
      ),
      score_b = colDef(
        name = "B",
        width = 62,
        align = "center",
        filterable = FALSE,
        cell = function(v, ri) score_cell(v, league_games$score_a[[ri]])
      ),
      name_b = colDef(
        name = "大学B",
        minWidth = 190,
        filterable = FALSE,
        cell = function(v, ri) {
          row <- league_games[ri, ]
          matchup_cell(row$name_b, row$team_b, row$c1_b, row$disp_b)
        }
      ),
      delta_a_disp = colDef(
        name = "変動(A)",
        width = 82,
        align = "right",
        filterable = FALSE,
        cell = function(v) {
          if (is.na(v)) {
            return(tags$span())
          }
          cls <- if (v > 0) {
            "change-up"
          } else if (v < 0) {
            "change-down"
          } else {
            "change-none"
          }
          fmt <- if (v > 0) paste0("+", sprintf("%.1f", v)) else sprintf("%.1f", v)
          tags$span(class = cls, fmt)
        }
      ),
      team_a = colDef(show = FALSE),
      team_b = colDef(show = FALSE),
      c1_a = colDef(show = FALSE),
      c1_b = colDef(show = FALSE),
      disp_a = colDef(show = FALSE),
      disp_b = colDef(show = FALSE)
    )
  )
)
```

<div class="back-links">
  <a href="../index.html" class="back-link">&#8592; ランキングに戻る</a>
  <a href="../methodology.html" class="back-link">&#8594; 計算方法の詳細</a>
</div>
